corrections_by_claim.note: The movement of high-skilled labor is a standard feature of capitalist competition for talent and does not provide evidence regarding whether R&D spending is productive or rent-seeking.
No engagement with the profit mechanism of AI firms.
Rhetorical alignment with state 'adversary' framing is not evidence of the state's constitutive role in the firm's capital accumulation or market position.
No data on profit rates or surplus extraction mechanisms.
No theoretical engagement with the mode of production.
